summary: E-commerce website for AR NUTS - a premium nuts, dry fruits & seeds brand targeting health-conscious families, gym-goers, and working professionals. Modern, clean design with product catalog, cart, checkout, and filters.
architectural_notes: Clean white background with premium gold & brown accent colors
Search bar and shopping cart icon in header
Footer with contact info, Instagram link, and policy pages

existing_features.title: Create a hero banner section displaying promotional offer text 'Healthy Snacks, Premium Quality' with a visually appealing background image
Implement a category browsing section with three main categories: Nuts, Dry Fruits, and Seeds, each with clickable navigation
Create a product listing page displaying all products with product image, name, price, weight options, and an Add to Cart button for each product
Implement product filtering functionality by price range, weight (200g, 250g, 500g), and category
Build a shopping cart feature that allows users to add products, view cart contents, update quantities, and remove items
Implement a wishlist feature allowing users to save products for later viewing
Create a Featured Products section on the homepage showcasing selected premium products with Add to Cart buttons
Build a Best Sellers section on the homepage displaying top-selling products
Create a Customer Reviews section on the homepage displaying user testimonials with star ratings
Implement a Why Choose Us section highlighting Fresh Stock, Affordable Price, and Fast Delivery as key brand benefits
Create a checkout page with order summary, customer information form, and Cash on Delivery (COD) payment option
Add a search bar in the header allowing users to search for products by name or category
Create a footer section with contact information, Instagram link, and policy links (Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Return Policy)
Add a WhatsApp order button that opens a WhatsApp chat with a pre-filled message containing cart details
Apply a modern, professional design theme with clean white background, premium gold and brown accent colors, and mobile-first responsive layout throughout the entire application
Update the footer contact information to display mobile number as '9345285169' and email as 'arnutssnacks@gmail.com'
Update the WhatsApp order button to use phone number '9345285169' for WhatsApp integration

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero banner with promotional offer display
Product listings with Add to Cart functionality
Best Sellers and Featured Products sections
Why Choose Us section (Fresh Stock, Affordable Price, Fast Delivery)
Build a product data model in the backend with fields for name, description, price, category, weight options (200g, 250g, 500g), image URL, and stock status
